keyRules: A maximum of 120 m above the ground (EASA Open Category)
Registration is required for drones weighing 120 g or more (a stricter requirement than EASA’s 250 g threshold)
The A1/A3 online training course is mandatory — minimum age 16
Mandatory liability insurance for all drone operations
Budapest: Permits for urban flights must be requested 30 days in advance
The MyDroneSpace app is required for every flight
Always maintain visual line of sight (VLOS)
Never fly over people, crowds, or public events
At least 5 km away from any airport or landing site
Parliament, government buildings, and military areas: complete flight ban
importantNotes: Registration is now mandatory for drones weighing 120 g or more—a much stricter requirement than the standard EASA threshold of 250 g
In Budapest, you must apply for a permit 30 days in advance—plan ahead
The MyDroneSpace app is required for every flight
Liability insurance is mandatory for all drones, regardless of weight
The GDPR applies if you collect data on identifiable individuals

fields.disclaimerText: Always check HungaroControl’s official sources and MyDroneSpace before flying. This app is only a tool—it is not a legal authority. Hungary follows EASA regulations with strict national supplements.
